entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-arid Tropics, a research center focused on semi-arid tropics

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, the overarching system for ICRISAT

entities.name: EXTERNAL PROGRAMME REVIEW
entities.description: A process used to evaluate the strategic and programmatic matters, mission relevance, and quality of science of a center

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A geographic region where ICRISAT has been active but is losing competitive advantage

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A geographic region where ICRISAT is encouraged to focus more and move its main activities and HQ

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL PUBLIC GOODS
entities.description: Impacts and deliveries provided by the center for the benefit of the public

entities.name: VIRTUAL UNIVERSITY
entities.description: An initiative of ICRISAT that lacks comparative advantage and critical mass

entities.name: SSA
entities.description: Sub-Saharan Africa, a specific region requiring a dedicated strategy

entities.name: SCIENCE OUTPUT
entities.description: The research results and quality of science produced by the center
